title: hieracium carpaticum subsp. aequilibratum
intro: Hieracium carpaticum subsp. aequilibratum is a subspecies of the Hieracium carpaticum plant, belonging to the dandelion family, which is a perennial herb with yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Hieracium carpaticum subsp. aequilibratum include its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms, making it a potential natural antiseptic agent. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, Hieracium carpaticum subsp. aequilibratum has been prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in salves and creams to take advantage of its potential anti-inflammatory properties.
